MELEE COMBAT In MW3 the term melee combat used to describe all close-quarters combal: unarmed; with hand-to hand weapons; Or even with firearms the attack takes place a range of less than meter and both combatants capable of fignting: anc at least one of them wants t0 engage melee combat (as opposed t0 both characters standing there and shooting at each other). the attack resolved as melee comoat attack. Unlike takxing shot from distance attacking melee combat involves a element of risk.
